label: MAIB header and agency branding
rights_boundary: departmental logo excluded by report reuse notice
reason: agency logo and decorative report branding are outside reusable corpus prose

label: Figure 1
title: RIBER throw bag
rights_boundary: product photograph; authorship and vendor boundary not relied on
reason: photograph, product identity and caption excluded

label: Figure 2
title: 15m rescue line with three joints
rights_boundary: evidence photograph; authorship not relied on
reason: photograph, annotations, measurements, counts, product evidence and caption excluded

label: Figure 3
title: Illustration showing a throw bag being used to rescue a casualty
reason: credited illustration, caption and rescue-use instruction excluded

label: Unnumbered ship, voyage and casualty particulars table
rights_boundary: Crown table excluded by task scope
reason: table, organization identity, incident detail and particulars excluded

label: Merchant Shipping regulations extract
reason: legal and regulatory text categorically excluded

label: Manufacturer notification and rowing newsletter material
rights_boundary: vendor and external-publication material summarized or referenced in report
reason: manufacturer identity, social-media content, newsletter content and product notification actions excluded

label: External popular throw-bag review
rights_boundary: externally authored web review cited in footnote
reason: external comparison, measurements and product information excluded

label: Commissioned independent laboratory tests
reason: laboratory identity, material specification, methods, loads, measurements, values and ratio excluded; only MAIB's qualitative analysis retained

label: US emergency-services rope standard
reason: standards text, definitions, measurements, thresholds and certification guidance excluded

label: Coastal public rescue equipment guide
reason: rescue-product specification, measurements, standards references and instructions excluded

label: Product-safety and equipment legal framework
reason: legal status, directives, regulations and compliance text excluded

label: Beach-safety review and scoping quotation
rights_boundary: externally authored study and direct quotation
reason: external study, quotation, identities, date and policy scope excluded

label: Other manufacturer and product incident reports
reason: brands, manufacturer identities, other incident narratives, sampling values and standards claims excluded

label: Standards-body development material
reason: standard-development actions, organization identities and policy recommendation excluded

label: Safety bulletin, product notification and alert actions
rights_boundary: separate Crown bulletin plus vendor and alert-system material
reason: product recall, inspection advice, emergency guidance, identifiers and operational actions excluded
